heading: Cooperation with and transfer to military departments
label: 3061 Cooperation with and transfer to military departments

children.heading: Transfers of resources and officers during national emergency
children.label: a Transfers of resources and officers during national emergency

children.heading: Transfers authorized
children.label: 1 Transfers authorized
children.text: The President may, whenever in the judgment of the President a sufficient national emergency exists, transfer to the service and jurisdiction of a military department such vessels, equipment, stations, and officers of the Administration as the President considers to be in the best interest of the country.

children.heading: Responsibility for funding of transferred resources and officers
children.label: 2 Responsibility for funding of transferred resources and officers
children.text: After any such transfer all expenses connected therewith shall be defrayed out of the appropriations for the department to which the transfer is made.

children.heading: Return of transferred resources and officers
children.label: 3 Return of transferred resources and officers
children.text: Such transferred vessels, equipment, stations, and officers shall be returned to the Administration when the national emergency ceases, in the opinion of the President.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: 4 Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed as transferring the Administration or any of its functions from the Department of Commerce except in time of national emergency and to the extent provided in this section.

children.heading: Limitation on transfer of officers
children.label: b Limitation on transfer of officers
children.text: This section does not authorize the transfer of an officer of the Administration to a military department if the accession or retention of that officer in that military department is otherwise not authorized by law.

children.heading: Status of transferred officers
children.label: c Status of transferred officers
children.text: An officer of the Administration transferred under this section, shall, while under the jurisdiction of a military department, have proper military status and shall be subject to the laws, regulations, and orders for the government of the Army, Navy, or Air Force, as the case may be, insofar as the same may be applicable to persons whose retention permanently in the military service of the United States is not contemplated by law.
